title: Cache-Aware Long Context Inference for Language Model Agents
abstract_or_excerpt: We propose a cache-aware inference method for long-context language model agents. The method reduces latency by 35% on a benchmark with 128k token traces and reports ablation studies for retrieval boundaries, KV cache movement, and throughput.

title: Reproducible Evaluation Pipelines for RAG Systems
abstract_or_excerpt: This paper introduces an evaluation pipeline for retrieval augmented generation with dataset curation, monitoring, benchmark slices, reproducibility notes, and observability metrics for production deployment.

title: BIM Digital Twins for Building Controls
abstract_or_excerpt: The engineering post describes BIM, IFC, HVAC, digital twin workflows, building controls, and facility operations. It includes implementation details for graph extraction from Revit models and deployment caveats.

title: Kernel Fusion for Distributed Training Throughput
abstract_or_excerpt: This engineering blog explains GPU kernel fusion, distributed training throughput, profiling, latency, memory layout, and production monitoring tradeoffs for large model training infrastructure.

title: Agent Evaluation with Tool Use Failure Modes
abstract_or_excerpt: We introduce a benchmark for language model agents using tools. The experiments measure reasoning failures, retrieval errors, latency, and reproducibility across 500 tasks with ablation studies.
